VAL-AUTH-010.evidence: POST /api/auth/login -> 200 with seed admin credentials. Response: token + user {id: 2e965a12-75dd-4a65-b733-1affcee2fbad, email: admin@datachat.local, role: admin}

VAL-AUTH-013.evidence: POST /api/admin/users -> 403 with user-role JWT. Body: {detail: Insufficient permissions. Required: [admin]}

VAL-AUTH-015.evidence: PUT /api/admin/users/{admin_id} -> 400 with {is_active: false}. Body: {detail: Cannot disable your own account}

VAL-AUTH-016.evidence: POST /api/admin/users -> 409 with duplicate email admin@datachat.local. Body: {detail: A user with this email already exists}

steps.observed: 409 A user with this email already exists

VAL-AGNOSTIC-001.evidence: SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema=public on client DB returned: alembic_version, audit_log, brand_config, dashboard_metadata, instructions, kb_pairs, sessions, users, view_metadata, write_whitelist. All 10 system tables found in client DB. Expected business tables (dim_products, fact_orders, inventory_snapshot) NOT present.

steps.expected: Only business data tables, no system tables

steps.action: Query all schemas for comprehensive listing
steps.expected: No system tables in any schema
steps.observed: System tables in public schema. Business tables missing entirely.

VAL-AGNOSTIC-001.issues: All 10 system tables exist in client DB public schema. Alembic migrations appear to have run against client DB (DATABASE_URL) instead of system DB (SYSTEM_DATABASE_URL). Business tables (dim_products, fact_orders, inventory_snapshot) are also missing from client DB.

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 4 passed, 1 failed. VAL-AUTH-010/013/015/016 all pass. VAL-AGNOSTIC-001 FAILS: all 10 system tables exist in client DB (Supabase), violating two-database architecture.
